episodes.title: The Seven Doctrines of The Potter’s House Cult
episodes.description:
critical examination of Christian Fellowship Ministries, also known as The Potter’s House, through the lens of a former member. The text argues that the organization functions as a cult by utilizing seven specific doctrines to exert total control over the lives, finances, and relationships of its followers. Key teachings such as divine placement and pastoral centralism are highlighted as tools used to demand absolute loyalty to leadership rather than to spiritual growth. Additionally, the materials describe a militarized culture where disciplehip is framed as "boot camp" and leaving the church is equated with "desertion." By misinterpreting scripture, the leadership reportedly creates a system of fear and isolation that discourages independent thought. Ultimately, the sources aim to expose these manipulative structures to help current and former members find clarity and freedom.
